'''povashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctotropic|nyctotropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctotropic|nyctotropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| povashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:povashithi|povashithi]] || [[word:povashiji|povashiji]] || [[word:povashishi|povashishi]] || [[word:povashiki|povashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:povashuthuthu|povashuthuthu]] || [[word:povashujuju|povashujuju]] || [[word:povashushushu|povashushushu]] || [[word:povashukuku|povashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:povashuthu|povashuthu]] || [[word:povashuju|povashuju]] || [[word:povashushu|povashushu]] || [[word:povashuku|povashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:povashufthuf|povashufthuf]] || [[word:povashufjuf|povashufjuf]] || [[word:povashufshuf|povashufshuf]] || [[word:povashufkuf|povashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:povashethe|povashethe]] || [[word:povasheje|povasheje]] || [[word:povasheshe|povasheshe]] || [[word:povasheke|povasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:povashothotho|povashothotho]] || [[word:povashojojo|povashojojo]] || [[word:povashoshosho|povashoshosho]] || [[word:povashokoko|povashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:povashotho|povashotho]] || [[word:povashojo|povashojo]] || [[word:povashosho|povashosho]] || [[word:povashoko|povashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:povashofthof|povashofthof]] || [[word:povashofjof|povashofjof]] || [[word:povashofshof|povashofshof]] || [[word:povashofkof|povashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:povashïfthïf|povashïfthïf]] || [[word:povashïfjïf|povashïfjïf]] || [[word:povashïfshïf|povashïfshïf]] || [[word:povashïfkïf|povashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:povashïfthïfthïf|povashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:povashïfjïfjïf|povashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:povashïfshïfshïf|povashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:povashïfkïfkïf|povashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:povashïfthïf|povashïfthïf]] || [[word:povashïfjïf|povashïfjïf]] || [[word:povashïfshïf|povashïfshïf]] || [[word:povashïfkïf|povashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:povashïfthïf|povashïfthïf]] || [[word:povashïfjïf|povashïfjïf]] || [[word:povashïfshïf|povashïfshïf]] || [[word:povashïfkïf|povashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:povashæthæ|povashæthæ]] || [[word:povashæjæ|povashæjæ]] || [[word:povashæshæ|povashæshæ]] || [[word:povashækæ|povashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:povashathatha|povashathatha]] || [[word:povashajaja|povashajaja]] || [[word:povashashasha|povashashasha]] || [[word:povashakaka|povashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:povashatha|povashatha]] || [[word:povashaja|povashaja]] || [[word:povashasha|povashasha]] || [[word:povashaka|povashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:povashafthaf|povashafthaf]] || [[word:povashafjaf|povashafjaf]] || [[word:povashafshaf|povashafshaf]] || [[word:povashafkaf|povashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:povashasha|povashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:povashësha|povashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povashrosha|povashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povashmusha|povashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:povashyasha|povashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovashnkshësha|gopovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovashnkrosha|gopovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovashnkmusha|gopovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovashnkyasha|gopovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:povavashasha|povavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povavashësha|povavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povavashrosha|povavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povavashmusha|povavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povavashyasha|povavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovavashnkshësha|gopovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovavashnkrosha|gopovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovavashnkmusha|gopovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovavashnkyasha|gopovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pevæshasha|pevæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pevæshësha|pevæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pevæshrosha|pevæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pevæshmusha|pevæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pevæshyasha|pevæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopevæshnkshësha|gopevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopevæshnkrosha|gopevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopevæshnkmusha|gopevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopevæshnkyasha|gopevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:povfashasha|povfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povfashësha|povfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povfashrosha|povfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povfashmusha|povfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povfashyasha|povfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovfashnkshësha|gopovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovfashnkrosha|gopovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovfashnkmusha|gopovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovfashnkyasha|gopovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
